news_items.headline: vllm-project/vllm released v0.20.0
news_items.summary:
New release v0.20.0 of vllm-project/vllm. # vLLM v0.20.0

## Highlights
This release features 752 commits from 320 contributors (123 new)!

* **DeepSeek V4**: Initial DeepSeek V4 support landed (#40860), with DSML token-leakage fix in DSV4/3.2 (#40806), DSA + MTP IMA fix (#40772), and a silu clamp limit on the shared expert (#40950).
* **CUDA 13.0 default**: Default CUDA wheel on PyPI and `vllm/vllm-openai:v0.20.0` image switched to

news_items.headline: ggml-org/llama.cpp released b8980
news_items.summary:
New release b8980 of ggml-org/llama.cpp. <details open>

hexagon: make vmem and buffer-size configurable (#22487)

* hexagon: allow host to set max vmem size

We use a sane default but it's helpful to allow for an override if needed.

* hexagon: add support for measuring vmem space and move pinned mmaping management to host

* hexagon: update vmem checks to use uint64

* hexagon: bump op buffers to 16 (matches max mmaps)

* hexagon: bump

news_items.headline: ollama/ollama released v0.22.1
news_items.summary:
New release v0.22.1-rc1 of ollama/ollama. ## What's Changed
* mlxrunner: batch the sampler across multiple sequences by @jessegross in https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/15736
* tokenizer: fix multi-regex BPE offset handling by @dhiltgen in https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/15844
* mlx: Support NVIDIA TensorRT Model Optimizer import by @dhiltgen in https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/15566
* app/server: fix desktop app startu

news_items.headline: ollama/ollama released v0.22.0
news_items.summary:
New release v0.22.0 of ollama/ollama. ## New models 
* NVIDIA's [Nemotron 3 Omni](https://ollama.com/library/nemotron3)
* Poolside's first open-weight coding model - [Laguna XS.2](https://ollama.com/library/laguna-xs.2)


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ollama/ollama/compare/v0.21.2...v0.22.0
